data.description: Buyback transaction details for April 16 - April 22, 2026 are out. Check out important numbers and details.

data.title: Mobile Vikings subscriptions hub powered by the Digital Vending Machine® from Bango
data.description: In Cambridge, UK on April 23, 2026, Bango, a key player in subscription bundling (AIM: BGO), revealed that Mobile Vikings, a major MVNO in Belgium under Proximus Group, has employed Bango's Digital Vending Machine® (DVM™) for its subscriptions hub. Mobile Vikings has introduced its first subscription through this platform, offering a prominent streaming service, and intends to unveil more digital subscriptions throughout 2026.

Goldman kicked off earnings season for the first time since 2018. FICC was soft, but investment banking fees surged 48% on M&A and debt underwriting. Bank of America and JPMorgan reported healthy consumer spending. Solid beats across all six major banks.

data.title: VEON 2025 Integrated Annual Report: Record Digital Growth, Sovereign AI and Kyivstar Listing Define a Transformative Year
data.description: On April 23, 2026, VEON Ltd. revealed its 2025 Integrated Annual Report (IAR 2025), marking a significant year for the company in terms of digital and financial achievements. The report highlights VEON's efforts in enhancing its Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) program. VEON, listed on Nasdaq as VEON, is a prominent global digital operator with a focus on improving its overall performance.

data.title: Global Custom T-Shirt Printing Market Forecast 2026-2036: USA, UK & South Korea Drive Growth Led by Printful, Custom Ink | Future Market Insights
data.description: In the recent market analysis conducted by Future Market Insights, it has been reported that the global custom t-shirt printing market is on track for significant growth. This surge is primarily propelled by a growing preference for personalized clothing, a higher uptake of print-on-demand systems, and various other factors. The expansion of this market signifies a promising opportunity for businesses involved in custom t-shirt printing. The specifics of the market's size and potential revenues were not disclosed in the provided information, but it outlines a positive outlook for the industry in the coming years.

data.title: MacGregor to supply deck machinery for ultra-large cable-laying vessels
data.description: Press Release - MacGregor Secured Contract to Provide Deck Machinery for Ultra-Large Cable-Laying VesselsOn April 23, 2026, MacGregor announced that they have been chosen to supply a full range of offshore and merchant deck machinery for ultra-large cable-laying vessels. The vessels, which will be built at Tersan Shipyard, will benefit from MacGregor's comprehensive package of equipment. This decision highlights MacGregor's expertise and reputation in the maritime industry.

data.title: Avalanche boosts fintechs with RWAs integration, tapping into an $18.9T market potential by 2033. Monetize yield, equities, and stablecoin payments.
data.description: Avalanche is allowing financial technology companies and online-only banks to incorporate Real World Assets, providing opportunities for earning, tokenized stocks, and secure payments. This move opens up new revenue streams for these firms.

data.title: Thailand's SEC plans to expand crypto derivatives, seeking input on rule changes to allow futures offerings and align with global standards.
data.description: Thailand's Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) is looking for feedback on proposed rule modifications that would permit cryptocurrency companies to provide futures contracts directly to consumers. This move is intended to enhance market entry and bring regulations in line with international norms.
